import_story.title: Live Pacing Gate Check
import_story.description: Plan 04 retro validation with real tension extraction.

qualities.rubric: Did the confrontation reach its climax?

checkpoints.name: Climax
checkpoints.objective: Reach the peak of the scene.

steps.eval: for (const key of Object.keys(globalThis).filter((k) => k.startsWith('storyOrchestratorDebug'))) delete globalThis[key]; globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.setExtractionSettings({ enabled: true, profileId: 'afcc7073-3510-4f67-8070-35ce449d4792', cadence: 2 }); return true;

steps.send_generate: The torches gutter out one by one as we edge down the narrowing corridor. Something is breathing in the dark ahead.
I draw my blade as the breathing turns into a low growl right behind the last torch bracket.
The growl explodes into a roar and claws scrape against stone as the thing charges at us.
I brace against the wall and swing my blade at the shape hurtling out of the darkness.
I press the attack while the creature reels backward.

steps.eval: const snap = globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getSnapshot(); if (!snap.tension || snap.tension.smoothed === null || snap.tension.smoothed === undefined) throw new Error('tension EMA missing: ' + JSON.stringify(snap.tension)); if (!snap.pacing || snap.pacing.enabled === false) throw new Error('pacing disabled'); return snap.tension;
